title: xolisma costata
intro: Xolisma costata, also known as the Spiny Bristle Club Moss or Spike Moss, is a type of non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting infections, as well as supporting immune function and promoting wound healing. Xolisma costata is commonly prepared in herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin infections.
